memberdef.definition: unsafe new ref MR.Vector4i64 MR.Box_Matrix4i64.this[int row]
memberdef.name: this[int row]

briefdescription.para: Make a copy of a struct. (Even though we initially pass is_owning: false, we then use the copy constructor to produce an owning instance.)

memberdef.argsstring: (in MR.Vector4i64 x, in MR.Vector4i64 y, in MR.Vector4i64 z, in MR.Vector4i64 w)
memberdef.name: Box_Matrix4i64

briefdescription.para: initializes matrix from 4 row-vectors Generated from constructor MR.Matrix4i64.Matrix4i64.
construct from rotation matrix and translation vector Generated from constructor MR.Matrix4i64.Matrix4i64.

memberdef.definition: unsafe new MR.Misc.? Ref< long > MR.Box_Matrix4i64.data
memberdef.name: data

briefdescription.para: column access Generated from method MR.Matrix4i64.col.
computes trace of the matrix Generated from method MR.Matrix4i64.trace.
compute sum of squared matrix elements Generated from method MR.Matrix4i64.normSq.
computes submatrix of the matrix with excluded i-th row and j-th column Generated from method MR.Matrix4i64.submatrix3.
computes determinant of the matrix Generated from method MR.Matrix4i64.det.
computes transposed matrix Generated from method MR.Matrix4i64.transposed.
Convert from a struct by copying it. Note that only ConstBox_Matrix4i64 has this conversion, Box_Matrix4i64 intentionally doesn't.
returns a matrix that scales uniformly Generated from method MR.Matrix4i64.scale.
x = a * b Generated from function MR::operator*.
product of two matrices Generated from function MR::operator*.
arbitrary 4x4 matrix Generated from class MR.Matrix4i64. This is the non-const reference to the struct.
